title: Macro-hardening re-evaluation for Layer1 Nangate45 seed candidates

task.objective: Re-evaluate current wrapped_io Layer1 seed candidates as hardened macros and promote candidates to evaluation_scope=macro_hardened when results are valid.

commands.name: harden_multiplier_macro
commands.run: python3 npu/synth/pre_synth_compute.py --platform nangate45 --config runs/designs/multipliers/mult16u_normal_koggestone_wrapper/config_mult16u_normal_koggestone.json --module mult16u_normal_koggestone_wrapper --id mult16u_normal_koggestone_wrapper_ng45_macro --out_root runs/designs/npu_macros --clock_period 2.5 --core_utilization 30 --make_target generate_abstract --tag_prefix l1_macro_mult16u_koggestone_ng45 --manifest_param source_variant=mult16u_normal_koggestone_nangate45_base --manifest_param evaluation_scope=macro_hardened

commands.name: harden_adder_macro
commands.run: python3 npu/synth/pre_synth_compute.py --platform nangate45 --config runs/designs/prefix_adders/adder_koggestone_64u_wrapper/config_adder_koggestone_unsigned_64bit.json --module adder_koggestone_64u_wrapper --id adder_koggestone_64u_wrapper_ng45_macro --out_root runs/designs/npu_macros --clock_period 2.5 --core_utilization 30 --make_target generate_abstract --tag_prefix l1_macro_adder64u_koggestone_ng45 --manifest_param source_variant=adder_koggestone_64u_nangate45_base --manifest_param evaluation_scope=macro_hardened

commands.name: update_candidates
commands.run: edit runs/candidates/nangate45/module_candidates.json: set evaluation_scope=macro_hardened and add macro_manifest for both variant_ids

acceptance: Both macro hardening runs append status=ok rows in their metrics.csv files
Candidate variants mult16u_normal_koggestone_nangate45_base and adder_koggestone_64u_nangate45_base are promoted to evaluation_scope=macro_hardened
Promoted candidates include macro_manifest paths that exist in the repository

handoff.pr_title: eval: macro-harden Layer1 nangate45 seed candidates
checklist: Commit only lightweight artifacts and metadata
Move this item from queued/ to evaluated/ and fill result
Include metrics row references (param_hash/tag/result_path) in result.metrics_rows

result.summary: Macro hardening completed for multiplier and adder wrapper candidates; both promoted to macro_hardened with manifest + macro metrics references in runs/candidates/nangate45/module_candidates.json.
result.notes: Queued commands referenced wrapper module names with --config mode, which cannot emit wrapper modules directly from the listed configs. Wrapper+IO-register insertion is generated by past flow scripts (see scripts/generate_design.py) to reduce IO pad timing effects. This command-shape correction belongs to task authoring/development flow, not evaluator role. Evaluator executed equivalent hardening via --src_verilog_dir using existing wrapper RTL, preserving requested ids/tags/manifest params/platform.
